amendments.reason: Implementation completed within planned A3 frontend reconcile scope after rebase to tracking 3f617ae4.

Manager-owned CI/gate fix after PR #1443: remove projects.py BOM, move FILE_ENTITY_CLASS into file_contracts to break workflow_watcher-runtime Sentrux cycle, and update full frontend API mocks for the new save-start listener export.
Manager-owned PR #1443 Python CI fix: make API file writes register a pending first-party signature before atomic replace so watcher echo events cannot race the authoritative file.changed event.
